Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Increases the limit for requests when filtering data in ordered lists.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Defines a limit on the number of requests for ordered lists in data stores per player, filtered by universe.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by managing how much data can be requested, ensuring smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests can be made per universe in a fixed order.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.purpose: Improves data management capabilities for developers by allowing more efficient data removal.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance by preventing excessive data removal requests from slowing down the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.purpose: Enables faster saving of player data, reducing wait times and improving gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many write requests a player can make to the data store.
Changed_Other.purpose: Prevents abuse of data storage, ensuring fairer gameplay for all players.

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Changed_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
